impact: Login cannot complete in dev; all protected UX blocked for normal users
evidence: Frontend calls /api/auth/login but request fails (net::ERR_ABORTED); vite proxy uses BACKEND_URL while docker-compose sets VITE_API_URL in frontend service
fix: Align env variable usage in vite proxy and docker-compose (use one source), add integration smoke test for auth

impact: Form accessibility fails; automated tests and screen readers cannot map labels
evidence: Playwright runtime check returned label bindings 0/0; FormField label has no htmlFor in design-system/components/FormField/index.tsx
fix: Generate unique ids in FormField and bind label htmlFor + input id

steps: Keyboard navigate to password visibility icon button
impact: Icon control has no accessible name
evidence: Login page password toggle button lacks aria-label/title in modules/auth/LoginPage.tsx
fix: Add aria-label dynamic text (show/hide password)

steps: Open top search in TopBar, type query, press Enter
impact: Global discovery is broken; users cannot quickly jump to objects
evidence: URL remains /projects after Enter; TopBar input has no onChange/search action in design-system/components/TopBar/index.tsx
fix: Wire TopBar search to /search route with debounced query and keyboard command palette

steps: Open page and click back button 'Назад'
impact: User gets redirected to dashboard instead of workflow list; context loss
evidence: Button navigates to /workflows; runtime resolves /workflows -> / via catch-all
fix: Replace /workflows with /workflow/templates everywhere

steps: Inspect breadcrumbs and click business-processes target
impact: Breadcrumb path inconsistent with router contracts
evidence: Breadcrumb href hardcoded /workflows in modules/workflow/WorkflowDesignerPage.tsx and WorkflowInstancePage.tsx
fix: Use shared route constants and lint for unknown route strings

impact: Horizontal overflow on critical data table screen
evidence: Playwright overflow check: scrollWidth-clientWidth diff 229 at 320px
fix: Add responsive table strategy: stacked rows, frozen essential columns, horizontal snap container

impact: Horizontal clipping on workflow editor
evidence: Playwright overflow diff 51 at 320px
fix: Add compact mobile layout and avoid fixed-width controls

impact: Small overflow on mobile field form
evidence: Playwright overflow diff 8 at 320px
fix: Audit fixed paddings/gaps and enforce mobile-safe spacing tokens

steps: Run npm run build in frontend container
impact: Production deployment blocked; no reliable perf baseline
evidence: TypeScript build emits hundreds of errors (891 lines output), including type mismatches and missing exports
fix: Introduce CI gate per module batch and fix type contracts before adding new modules

steps: Review build output for UI modules
impact: Large surface area of unstable pages
evidence: Errors in workflow, safety, rfi, submittals, portfolio, warehouse and more
fix: Stabilize domain types with schema-first API client generation

impact: Data integrity risk: mock data can mask backend failures
evidence: Large count of placeholderData + mock datasets across core modules
fix: Separate demo mode explicitly; show 'demo data' badge and disable transactional actions in demo mode

steps: Open list and trigger delete bulk action
impact: Destructive action UX is unsafe and non-enterprise
evidence: Bulk delete uses window.confirm and maps to changeStatus('CANCELLED') in ProjectListPage
fix: Use confirmation modal with object list, undo window, audit log entry

impact: Rows are clickable by mouse but not keyboard operable
evidence: DataTable uses tr onClick without role/button semantics in design-system/components/DataTable/index.tsx
fix: Render row action as focusable control or add role='button', tabIndex and key handlers

impact: Table semantics incomplete for assistive tech
evidence: No caption, no scope attrs, no aria-sort in DataTable headers
fix: Add table caption, scope='col', aria-sort and accessible row selection labels

steps: Inspect checkbox controls in table selection
impact: Checkbox purpose unclear to screen readers
evidence: Selection checkboxes have no aria-label in DataTable
fix: Add per-row aria-label and header 'select all rows' label

steps: Open modal and inspect aria attributes
impact: Potential id collisions with multiple dialogs
evidence: Modal always uses id='modal-title' in design-system/components/Modal/index.tsx
fix: Generate unique modal ids per instance

impact: Focus management not fully trapped
evidence: Modal focuses container but does not enforce focus loop
fix: Implement focus trap with sentinels and restore focus on close

severity: Inspect sidebar badges and runtime values
impact: medium
evidence: Notification counters are hardcoded and can mislead users
fix: Sidebar items use static badge values 3 and 5 in design-system/components/Sidebar/index.tsx
column8: Drive badges from API state and hide when stale/unavailable

steps: Try command+K and enter query in topbar
impact: Two search entry points disconnected; weak IA
evidence: Global search page exists (/search) but topbar input does not route there
fix: Create object-centric universal search with shortcuts and recent entities

steps: Inspect Button variants used across modules
impact: Inconsistent API causes build/runtime mismatch
evidence: Workflow pages use variant='outline' but Button supports primary/secondary/ghost/danger/success only
fix: Standardize button variant tokens and add TS-safe enum + codemod

steps: Inspect FormField usage in complex forms
impact: Inconsistent labeling and hint/error patterns
evidence: Many pages use raw label + Input instead of FormField contract
fix: Create lint rule for mandatory FormField wrapper on inputs

impact: Localization infrastructure exists but unused in UI
evidence: No imports from '@/i18n' in tsx files; text hardcoded Russian
fix: Adopt translation hook and externalize user-facing strings incrementally

impact: Locale flexibility limited for multinational deployments
evidence: lib/format.ts hardcodes ru-RU and ru locale
fix: Use active locale from i18n layer for number/date formatters

impact: Draft workflow is deceptive; data loss risk
evidence: MobileReportNewPage handleSubmit only toast+navigate, no persistence
fix: Persist drafts to API/local storage with recovery prompt

steps: Search for service worker/offline cache implementation
impact: No offline resilience for field workflows
evidence: No serviceWorker/workbox/offline strategy in frontend sources
fix: Implement PWA shell, queue writes, and conflict resolution UI

impact: Catch-all redirect hides navigation errors
evidence: Route '*' always navigates to '/' in routes/index.tsx
fix: Add 404 page with actionable recovery and diagnostics

impact: Design regressions can ship unnoticed
evidence: No *.test.tsx found in src
fix: Add component tests for DS primitives and high-risk pages

impact: Current e2e tests validate visibility only, not business behavior
evidence: navigation.spec.ts checks body visible and generic text
fix: Expand to critical path e2e: create project -> procurement -> stock movement -> payment

impact: UI drift risk across dense enterprise screens
evidence: No visual snapshot tests configured
fix: Add Playwright screenshot baselines by viewport + Percy/Chromatic-like workflow

impact: high
evidence: Form and icon controls missing names
fix: Automated scan: unlabeled form controls and icon buttons without accessible name on key pages
column8: Add accessibility checks in CI (axe) and enforce aria/name linting

impact: high
evidence: High count of unnamed icon-only controls
fix: Automated scan found 7 icon buttons without name on workflow designer
column8: Add aria-label/title and visible tooltip text for icon actions

impact: medium
evidence: Selection clear icon has no text/aria
fix: Toolbar X button in DataTable lacks accessible name
column8: Set aria-label='Снять выделение' and keyboard shortcut hint

impact: Cold start is heavy for enterprise laptop networks
evidence: Playwright perf sample: ~6227 KB transfer on first route in dev
fix: Collect prod Lighthouse after build fix, then enforce JS budget and route prefetch policy

impact: Chunking is coarse and not domain-oriented
evidence: vite.config.ts manualChunks only vendor/charts/table/query
fix: Split by route groups and lazy-load heavy boards/charts/editors

impact: Scalability risk on long lists
evidence: No virtualization code in DataTable or pages; full render + client pagination
fix: Add virtualized rows and server pagination for >1k rows

steps: Inspect list pages for saved views
impact: Power users cannot preserve filters/layouts
evidence: No saved views/presets implementation found
fix: Implement per-user saved views with share and default pinning

steps: Inspect workflow transparency around state changes
impact: Action consequences not explicit
evidence: Many forms/actions lack impact preview and post-action timeline integration
fix: Add timeline side panel + 'what will change' confirmation blocks

steps: Inspect form autosave and recovery patterns
impact: Long forms are fragile for interruptions
evidence: No generic autosave infrastructure across FormPage components
fix: Add autosave SDK and stale-draft conflict UI

steps: Compare pages using old placeholder namespace
impact: Mixed maturity surface degrades trust
evidence: Router still maps /documents to pages/placeholders/DocumentListPage while other domains are richer
fix: Prioritize replacement of placeholder routes with production module pages
